title: Zinc and magnesium in pregnancy
excerpt: Roles in immunity and muscle function, food sources, and why mega-dosing supplements without guidance is risky.
content:
## Zinc

Supports growth and immune function. Found in meat, shellfish (fully cooked), beans, nuts, whole grains.

## Magnesium

Involved in muscle and nerve function; leg cramps are multifactorial. Sources: greens, nuts, seeds, whole grains, dark chocolate in moderation.

## Supplements

Prenatal vitamins often cover basics. Extra magnesium or zinc only if your clinician identifies deficiency — high doses can cause side effects.
